reason: BE quality bar — type-first, no untyped dict manipulation, test intent encoding (Rules 7+11).
Translator contract — reviewer verifies R4/R5 changes match §6 and any new spec lines land in the same PR.
I-E-E rule — reviewer verifies ReasoningDeltaEvent + NodeCompletedEvent carve-out matches the emit-only set.
Subgraph node contracts — reviewer verifies every cc/re/plan node uses chat_model_reasoning per PRD R3.
LLMClient contract — reviewer verifies two-instance topology + extra_body wiring + ChatDeepSeek migration is reflected here.
Reviewer verifies orchestrator carve-out matches spec (TextDelta + ReasoningDelta + NodeCompleted all emit-only with session_seq=None).
Failure-mode coverage — provider swap may surface new error types (DashScope quota, enable_thinking rejection on non-hybrid models).
Old PPIO-named log lines must be renamed (PRD R7 purge); reviewer enforces consistent log naming for DashScope.
Reviewer verifies no orphan session_events rows from misclassified ReasoningDeltaEvent (the latent bug PRD R6 fixes).
Cross-layer contract index — reviewer verifies Rule 10 (contract changes require spec updates) is satisfied for runtime/events/clients.
CI guardrails — reviewer verifies new ChatDeepSeek dep, removed langchain-openai dep, and any new env-var requirements are reflected in CI config.
FE↔BE contract — reviewer verifies the reasoning_delta SSE shape hasn't changed and FE wiring still matches.
FE quality bar — for any FE tweaks if AC1 Playwright test requires component changes.
FE type-safety — reviewer verifies any FE-side changes preserve the ReasoningDeltaEvent shape.
Reviewer uses this as the source-of-truth for what reasoning_content arrives in additional_kwargs and validates the emitter extension against the recorded shape.
Reviewer cross-checks the PPIO purge: no leftover references to deepseek-r1 / ppio / pa/gpt-5-* (PRD R7 + AC5).
Shared guides for code-reuse + cross-layer review (multi-layer change spans L2/L3/L4).
